## Tool Or Platform

What should SMERC integrate with?

## Execution Boundary

Where would SMERC sit before an action executes?

## Action Types

What actions should be scored?

## Existing Controls

What IAM, policy, approval, logging, or security controls already exist?

## Useful SMERC Output

Which outputs would matter most: posture, reason codes, controls, replay ID, audit record, permit, metrics?
